title: Create: Endless Industry
description: A large Create-focused modpack about automation, engineering, factories, exploration, building, changed progression, and creating your own endless industrial world.
body:
# Create: Endless Industry **Create: Endless Industry** is a large-scale industrial survival modpack built around Create, automation, engineering, exploration, progression, and world interaction. What begins as a small workshop can eventually become a fully automated industrial network with massive factories, transportation systems, production chains, resource processing facilities, and large-scale infrastructure projects. Unlike many Create-based packs, automation is only one part of the experience. The world itself evolves alongside your industry, introducing environmental systems, dynamic events, exploration challenges, and long-term progression that continue to matter throughout your playthrough. The modpack also features more than **90 Create-focused addons and expansions**, greatly expanding automation, logistics, engineering, transportation, and industrial production. Create: Endless Industry offers a large-scale technical sandbox designed for long-term progression, automation, exploration, and industrial development. --- # Core Idea The goal of Create: Endless Industry is simple: **Build an industrial world without losing the feeling of survival.** Every machine, factory, railway, production line, and infrastructure project becomes part of your progression. You are free to choose your own path: * Build massive factories * Design transportation networks * Automate farms and resource production * Explore distant regions * Develop industrial cities * Expand infrastructure * Create large engineering projects * Master environmental challenges Progress is not defined by rushing to the endgame. It is defined by what you build along the way. --- # What Can You Expect? * Create-focused gameplay * Expanded Create experience * Advanced automation systems * Factory building and engineering * Mechanical production chains * Resource processing and logistics * Dynamic world events * Environmental simulation systems * Expanded survival mechanics * Improved exploration * New structures and locations * Building and decoration content * Long-term progression * Quality-of-life improvements * Optimization and performance enhancements ---
Create and Automation Create remains the heart of the modpack. Build production lines, automated farms, storage systems, transportation networks, industrial complexes, rail infrastructure, and large-scale factories using an expanded collection of Create content. The pack includes more than **90 Create-focused addons and expansions**, introducing new machines, production methods, engineering tools, logistics systems, transportation solutions, automation possibilities, and mechanical challenges. Additional content significantly expands the Create experience while preserving its core design philosophy. Whether you prefer compact workshops or continent-sized factory networks, the progression is designed to support both approaches.
---
Dynamic World Systems The world is no longer static. Natural events can reshape the environment and create new challenges during gameplay. Features include: * Earthquakes * Volcanic eruptions * Geological activity * Tectonic movement systems These events make the world feel more dynamic and add additional reasons to adapt and expand your infrastructure.
---
Environmental Survival Survival extends beyond food and equipment. Extreme environments now require preparation. Features include: * Oxygen system for high-altitude and underground exploration * Oxygen tanks for extended expeditions * Air pollution generated by industrial activity * Reduced air quality near heavy industry * Acid rain caused by excessive pollution * Gas masks for hazardous regions Your industrial growth now has visible consequences for the world around you.
---
Living World The environment reacts to player activity. Frequently traveled routes gradually become visible trails, creating natural roads across the landscape. Weather also plays a larger role: * Rain can create temporary water sources * Cauldrons fill naturally during storms * Environmental conditions affect the world around you Additional details such as collectible sticks, stones, and other natural objects help make the world feel more alive and immersive.
---
Industrial Progression Progression is designed to encourage planning and expansion rather than rushing through content. As you advance, you will: * Improve production efficiency * Expand storage systems * Upgrade transportation networks * Develop industrial infrastructure * Increase automation capabilities * Prepare for advanced stages of progression Factories are not decorative projects. They become essential parts of your development.
---
Changed End Progression Reaching the End requires significantly more effort than in vanilla Minecraft. Instead of collecting a single type of Eye of Ender, players must obtain **11 unique Eyes** through exploration, progression, and world interaction. After gathering all required components, they must be activated within a special portal hidden inside a massive castle structure. This transforms the End into a true late-game objective rather than a quick milestone.
---
Exploration Exploration plays an important role throughout the entire playthrough. Discover: * New structures * Rare resources * Unique locations * Progression-related discoveries * Hidden rewards * Improved world generation Traveling beyond your base is often necessary to unlock new opportunities and continue advancing.
---
Building and Decoration Industry looks better when it feels part of the world. The modpack includes a large selection of decorative and architectural content for: * Factories * Warehouses * Train stations * Industrial districts * Workshops * Farms * Cities * Infrastructure projects Create your own industrial landscapes without sacrificing functionality.
---
Performance and Optimization Despite its size, performance remains a major focus. Recent optimization improvements provide: * Improved FPS stability * Reduced memory usage * Faster world loading * Better performance in large Create factories * Increased overall stability Recommended RAM: **9–12 GB** Minimum: **6 GB** (not recommended) If the game appears frozen during startup, allow additional time for initialization before closing it.
--- # Final Note Create: Endless Industry is designed for players who enjoy building projects that continue to grow throughout an entire playthrough. Start with a workshop. Build a factory. Create transportation networks. Expand your infrastructure. Adapt to environmental challenges. Shape the world around you. Build your own endless industry.
